asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The video successfully demonstrates a multi-user live join workflow for a startup banking diligence room, showing the creation, code sharing, and collaborative chat interface.

featureClarity.evidence: The walkthrough clearly shows Maya creating a room, copying the code, and Priya joining the same room.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full sequence from room creation to sharing the code and collaborating in real-time.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode UI is modern and well-structured, though the density of information is high.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom concept of shared workspaces, live agents, and collaborative room traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from the web application, showing realistic user interactions and state updates.

legibility.evidence: Most text and UI elements are readable, though some smaller labels require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and deal teams coordinating startup diligence.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the multi-user synchronization and chat functionality without simulated effects.

observedEvidence: Landing page with room creation button
Second user entering code to join
Shared chat and synchronized room state

defects.observed: Abrupt transition between Maya's view and Priya's landing page view.
defects.fix: Add a brief fade transition or visual separator to clarify the perspective switch.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: See how multiple team members can instantly join a shared startup diligence room using a unique room code to collaborate with NodeAgents.
